Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-03-2005 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-03-2005 Assigned To Master Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Wick (Dept. 611), clerk-beth wilber, reporter-candace yount: cause called for hearing on minor's compromise. Mr. Sears appears for minor Harrison Herick and guardian ad litem Randal A. Hetrick, both of whom are also present in court. Matter was not contested. Upon Randal Hetrick representation to the court that the compromise is satisfactory, Judge Wick signs the order. Court approves settlement in the amount of $405,000.00:
Less attorney fees of $98,608.18, $10,567.30 for expenses paid by petitioner, $37,004.09 to Healthcare Recoveries, $2,430.18 to City of San Francisco. The remaining judgment balance of $256,390.25 will be placed in a structured settlement.

Off Calendar May-27-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion To Submit to Mediation in Lieu of Arbitration is scheduled this day. Joinder of Defendants Fuji Restaurant & Hydeon Sook Park is also scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant Plaintiff's Motion and Defendant's Joinder is adopted. Motion and Joinder are ordered granted. Court ordered case removed from Judicial Arbitration. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered a Jury Trial Date of 11/29/2004 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Court ordered a Mediation enforcement OSC scheduled on 8/11/2004 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212.
